result: **No actionable context.** Previous summary identified the activity log as procedurally-generated operational noise (routine scaling, restarts, patches, health checks across services/environments) with no incident, decision, or next action. New activity since then is identical noise: 50+ routine infrastructure operations (scheduler-core, user-profile-service, payment-gateway, etc.) across blue/green/staging/prod/QA/canary/dev with no signal. Previous summary flagged security concerns about the data itself. No work to continue.
